programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family buys a property with everything except a safe structure to call home; the team swoop in to save the day, combating a nor'easter along the way, to create a four season haven.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Spruce Mountain Ski Lodge is in need of vital repairs in order to keep serving the community; the guys demo with a whole new twist, Ashley finds a scaly friend to introduce to Ryan and Chase lands the season's first jump.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The "Maine Cabin Masters" are here to help out a family with one of their most unique builds yet, a geodesic dome.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family buys a property with everything except a safe structure to call home; the team swoop in to save the day, combating a nor'easter along the way, to create a four season haven.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Spruce Mountain Ski Lodge is in need of vital repairs in order to keep serving the community; the guys demo with a whole new twist, Ashley finds a scaly friend to introduce to Ryan and Chase lands the season's first jump.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The "Maine Cabin Masters" are here to help out a family with one of their most unique builds yet, a geodesic dome.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A sudden severe thunderstorm destroyed the Palumbo family's beloved camp, but they're ready to rebuild; the team hopes to grant them a miracle in the wreckage, with a bigger bathroom and a sunroom that feels connected to the rest of the camp.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The builders turn to the old-school method of using ropes to take down a log cabin in Harrisville, W.Va.; they meet some modern-day pioneers who hewed their own log cabin by hand.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.sub-title: High-End Timber Frame Kitchen in Brevard, N.C
programme.desc: The crew members build a timber-frame kitchen that will be the centerpiece of a high-end mountain retreat in Brevard, N.C.; later, Mark and the guys visit some of the architect's other spectacular log homes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters never do sub-par work, and they can't get the job done without some help from their subcontractors; Jedi, Brad and Canadian Jay review some of their best moments.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Ashley and Jedi remember pet projects great and small; including a corgi-sized bunk bed for a canine foster home, a tennis ball slingshot, and a five-star chicken coop.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tropical trees for the backyard; a tool that makes asphalt roof work easier; home smart light products.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Restoring a bulkhead; combination squares; repairing crumbling mortar on brick front stairs.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: This Old House
programme.sub-title: Atlanta Postmaster's House: Whole House Protection
programme.desc: Progress is made on the interior and exterior of the house; bevel pine siding is woven into the old; touring Tyler Perry Studios; adding lightning and surge protection; the Dracut Centre School restoration is completed.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: This Old House
programme.sub-title: Atlanta Postmaster's House: Respecting the Old
programme.desc: The old details of the home are respected; new porch columns are made to match the old; a bathroom gets a concrete-like finish; installing a reclaimed front door; visiting Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s birth home.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: This Old House
programme.sub-title: Atlanta Postmaster's House: Repointed and Planted
programme.desc: Planting a medicinal garden; cleaning and preparing the front door for paint; repairing the front steps; installing a water heater; building custom shelves; installing wallpaper.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The renovation of the 1890s Victorian is completed; the family of the former owner meets the homeowners; touring the new spaces; mounting the lending library.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A family of three moving from Colorado to Texas wants a slower pace and a big-acreage home with modern flair, unavailable where they're coming from.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: NFL players reach out to Chip and Joanna to help renovate the home for a veteran to make it more accessible for him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Seeing potential in forgotten historic spaces, city homeowners stretched their creativity and modernized historic residences for family living in New Orleans, London, and Chicago.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Ambitious homeowners tackle the challenge of transforming unusual structures into thoughtfully designed family homes--from a converted cowshed in the English countryside to an abandoned church in New York and an old mechanic shop in London.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: It Takes a Village of People
programme.desc: Chase and Ashley rally the Cabin Masters to help build a new arts and crafts building; with no budget for the project, the Cabin Masters get help from the community to finish the build before the winter snow.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Thirty years after purchasing their lakeside home, grandparents need more space than their 100-year-old camp can provide for their growing family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: For Ted Wiederhorn, a cabin on the ocean front was a dream he always had; with his wish granted after purchasing an abandoned lobster shack on a peninsula, it's up to the Cabin Masters to get this shack running again.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: A Blank Slate Build for Mom
programme.desc: The McQuaids want to build a cabin for their family's matriarch across from their own cabin on David Pond; the build becomes a blank slate for the Cabin Masters, who work to design a camp that can work as her home away from home for years to come.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: An Upstate New York couple dreams of purchasing a home along the shores of Oneida Lake; however, finding an affordable property that overlooks the water and has plenty of space for their family may require some sweat equity and an ambitious plan.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family of 30.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Family Affair on the Southern Tier
programme.desc: A New Jersey couple seeks to fulfill a lifelong dream of purchasing a home near their families in New York's Southern Tier; they hope to find an outdated cottage they can renovate into a cozy escape where their young family can enjoy lake life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Md.; their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people but finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: All Hands on Deck on Cedar Creek Lake
programme.desc: A family from the Dallas, Texas area aims to escape the summer city heat by scoring a bargain property on Cedar Creek Lake; a little bit of elbow grease goes a long way when the entire family pitches in to transform their new lake house into the perfect waterfront retreat. And with their dogs joining them, they add a few personal touches to make their four-legged friends feel right at home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Enjoying the Seasons in Adirondack Park
programme.desc: A married Brooklyn couple searches for a vacation home in the Adirondack Park region of upstate New York; they love the multi-seasonal appeal of the area, but many of the properties within their budget need significant renovations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Md.; their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people but finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: All Hands on Deck on Cedar Creek Lake
programme.desc: A family from the Dallas, Texas area aims to escape the summer city heat by scoring a bargain property on Cedar Creek Lake; a little bit of elbow grease goes a long way when the entire family pitches in to transform their new lake house into the perfect waterfront retreat. And with their dogs joining them, they add a few personal touches to make their four-legged friends feel right at home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Enjoying the Seasons in Adirondack Park
programme.desc: A married Brooklyn couple searches for a vacation home in the Adirondack Park region of upstate New York; they love the multi-seasonal appeal of the area, but many of the properties within their budget need significant renovations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Family Affair on the Southern Tier
programme.desc: A New Jersey couple seeks to fulfill a lifelong dream of purchasing a home near their families in New York's Southern Tier; they hope to find an outdated cottage they can renovate into a cozy escape where their young family can enjoy lake life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.sub-title: Adapt and Overcome In Hamlin, W.V
programme.desc: In spite of some rough going, the builders never give up on a log cabin, and it turns out to be worth all the extra effort; Mark hunts for replacement logs, while the team finds creative ways of pulling the cabin apart without sacrificing its logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.sub-title: Hope Rises in White Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After the flood waters recede, the builders join the recovery efforts in White Sulphur Springs, W. Va.; the team builds a timber-frame pavilion as the centerpiece of a memorial park, and community members build barn-wood picnic tables.

programme.title: Second Chance Stage
programme.desc: Five acts share their love of music, dance and magic for a shot at making it to the finale for the chance of winning $100,000.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.sub-title: A Treehouse Fit for a Viking
programme.desc: Pete takes on his first international tree house in Norway; working alongside a local builder named Frode, the one-of-a-kind, 24-foot-high retreat accommodates eight and allows for stunning views of the nearby lake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: The NTS team leave their tents behind and head to New Jersey to build a campers' retreat for an outdoor-loving couple; with a screened-in porch, floating barbecue deck and cozy hanging bed, this Adirondack style tree-cabin puts glamping in the trees.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete builds a citadel fortress for a Texan couple who loves all things medieval; a 25-foot-high tower holds a round table and thrones, as well as a glass floor loft; a metalsmith joins the build to craft medieval touches.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete pushes his design skills to create an owl-inspired tree house library in Charlotte, N.C.; evoking the face of the bird and using all sorts of curves, including rounded walls and semi-circle bookcases, the crew builds a one-of-a-kind masterpiece.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.sub-title: Chase Hunts for an Italian Dream Home
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters want to test their skills in Italy; Chase, Sarah and their four children set out house hunting in the remote Italian countryside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.sub-title: Demolition and a New Italian Bathroom
programme.desc: Chase, Sarah, Ashley and Ryan have arrived in Italy for the long haul; they need to work with the locals to demolish the house and complete their first big project before the kids arrive - these kids will need a working bathroom.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.sub-title: Building Italy: Bedrooms and a Basement Floor
programme.desc: Chase has two big projects to juggle; the kids have big ideas for their four bedrooms on the second floor, while the basement has walls needing demolition and new floors that need to be poured if he's to keep on schedule for the future family room.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.desc: The cabin masters and Morrill family take on their most ambitious project yet; Chase discovers local stoneworkers; he embraces the kids artistic side; guests from Maine arrive to lend a hand.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.sub-title: From Animal Stables to a New Family Room
programme.desc: Even with Ashley, Ryan and Jedi to help, Chase and family have a ton of work to do to turn their walkout basement into a family room complete with a new bathroom; only Chase could find a second life for old animal troughs.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.desc: With two weeks left and a ton of work remaining, including exteriors, roofing, decking, landscaping and a missing bedroom, Chase, Ashley, Ryan, Sarah and the kids have to rally to finish the house.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Washington couple and their four kids take on the majority of their beach house renovations themselves, but the help doesn't stop there, as extended family and good friends drop in to help them turn a bargain buy into their dream vacation getaway.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Ambitious Beach Dreams in Corolla, North Carolina
programme.desc: A couple who met along the shores of Corolla, N.C., searches for a home in town they can renovate into their dream vacation getaway, but finding an affordable beach property they can transform on schedule and budget could be a challenge.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Family Renovates a Home on NJ's Barnegat Bay
programme.desc: A couple partners with their adult daughter to look for an outdated home along Barnegat Bay, N.J., that they can work on themselves to transform into a beach getaway to enjoy with the rest of their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Cutting Costs on the New Jersey Coast
programme.desc: A New Jersey family sets their sights on Ocean County, where canal homes allow residents to enjoy the ocean and the bays created by a barrier island; after years of visiting family and friends, buying a home will give them a place to call their own.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Historical Charm With a Bold New Look in Galveston
programme.desc: A single mom from Houston who restores rundown homes is looking for her next project in Galveston, Texas; with the help of her father and the rest of her team, she hopes to find a house that's not only affordable, but that's also near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Family Flip in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: Two brothers and their mother team up to find a rundown beach house they can renovate and sell along the coast of Gulf Shores, Ala.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Philly Couple Renos a South Jersey Shore Vacation Home
programme.desc: A Philadelphia couple who both grew up spending their summers at the Jersey shore are looking to buy a beach house. They plan to put in a lot of sweat equity to keep the budget low and create a dream getaway for their growing family.
